## Description

<!-- What changed and why? Link to relevant discussions or issues. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the one that applies: -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance or dependency update
- [ ] `style` — Formatting (no logic change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `build` — Build system or tooling

## Related issues / discussions

<!-- Link any related issues or discussions: Fixes #123, Relates to Discussion #456 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows TW3 coding conventions
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality (where applicable)
- [ ] I have updated documentation for changed behavior (where applicable)
- [ ] I have added a changelog entry
- [ ] My changes introduce no proprietary dependencies
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] This PR targets the `development` branch
